author: @brokensandals1778
text: I think this model is much closer to true AI compared to current LLMs, which often generate outputs without understanding their correctness. This approach also appears significantly more efficient.

author: @thenextleapforward
text: Yeah it's the same concept as diffusion networks and these 'latent space' models that have the networks think not in tokens, but abstract latent space.

author: @PrimeStackPro
text: If Yann wasn't that mad at the industry for sticking with language models, we might not have VL-JEPA so early. Even research is a competitive space. And we get to witness first-hand the AI race thickening.

author: @CharaTR
text: 5:26 Wait a minute, isn't this scene like that one? You know how people tell you "don't speak without thinking"? Movies are about people who talk a lot without thinking, and this new model is about people who think before they speak, in a way.
